name: Rains Fall | CYOS
description:
There are so few of him that I just wanted to make a CYOS for those who have an idea for a scenerio but don't feel confident enough to make a bot themselves. Don't worry, I've been there!

The image is actually the concept art for Rains Fall, so, yuh.

TW: None unless you make one
